story.iWant: inject "Analyze with Suna" buttons next to detected coins

subtasks.subtask: Define button injection function: `injectAnalysisButton(element: HTMLElement, coinData: CoinDetection): void`
Set button text: "Analyze with Suna" hoặc similar
Position button next to detected coin element
Handle different element types (inline, block, etc.)
Import Tailwind CSS (if available) hoặc use inline styles
Match extension design (reference frontend button component)
Ensure button is visible và readable
Test button styling on different backgrounds
Add click event listener to button
Add unique identifier to button (data attribute)
Test button on inline elements (spans, links)
Test button on block elements (divs, paragraphs)
Test button positioning với different CSS layouts
Verify button doesn't break page layout

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Button injected next to detected coin elements
Button styling matches extension design (reuse Tailwind classes)
Button click handler sends message to background worker
Duplicate injection prevention (check if button already exists)
Button visible và clickable trên various page layouts

doc.title: Browser Extension Architecture - Suna.so
doc.snippet: Non-intrusive button injection pattern. Create button element, position next to coin element, add click handler sending message to background worker. Avoid duplicate injection.

doc.title: Story 11.2: Content Script Injection
doc.snippet: Content script runs coin detection và returns CoinDetection[] với element references. These element references can be used for button injection.

doc.reason: Reference for button styling. Can reuse Tailwind classes từ frontend button component.

file.reason: Button injection module. Function: injectAnalysisButton(element: HTMLElement, coinData: CoinDetection): void
CoinDetection type definition. Used as parameter for button injection function.

constraint.description: Button doesn't break page layout. Position relative to coin element. Use CSS positioning (relative/absolute) if needed. Handle different element types và layouts.
Use chrome.runtime.sendMessage() to send to background worker. Message format: { type: 'ANALYZE_COIN', coin: string }. Background worker will handle analysis request.
Check for existing button before injection. Use unique class name: .suna-analyze-btn. Add data attributes for identification. Handle re-injection scenarios.

interface.name: injectAnalysisButton Function
interface.signature: function injectAnalysisButton(element: HTMLElement, coinData: CoinDetection): void

tests.standards: Testing standards: Test button injection function works, test button appears next to coin elements, test button styling is correct, test click handler sends message, test duplicate prevention works, test button works trên various page layouts. Use Chrome DevTools để verify button injection và message sending.

ideas.test: Test injector.ts module exports injectAnalysisButton function
Test button appears next to detected coin elements
Test button styling matches extension design
Test button click sends message to background worker
Test duplicate prevention prevents multiple buttons
Test button works trên various page layouts (inline, block, table, list)
